replies.text:
i hate Hasan as much as anyone else here  but can people explain to nonamericans how is trying to drive away from a masked unidentified individual makes you subject to a public excecution. 
I swear that in any country if people talked about this the way asmongold does they would be humilliated and condemed. I am inclined to think this is 100% an american thing, and our cultural differences just don`t let us understand. Like how arranged marriage with young children are a common practice in the middle east, something we would find repulsive, this case is the same but for americans since they find this completely normal and acceptable.

replies.text: ​@irrelevant12 how are they unidentified if they are wearing the uniform with clear markings telling you who they work for?

replies.author: @pestilencemercury2230
replies.text:
​@irrelevant12 they also hit the officer which is battery with a deadly weapon. 

4 videos, 4 different angles, only 1 gets shown because it makes it hard to see. 2 show the officer getting hit and the last one shows that the driver was actively impeding law enforcement.

replies.author: @Sparkykev666
replies.text:
​@irrelevant12they had already identified themselves as federal agents, including having a truck with the lights on, and their vests demarcating their department. Then proceeded to give a lawful order to someone interfering in an enforcement action to get out of their vehicle. She refused, then proceeded to turn her vehicle into a weapon by accelerating towards one of the agents. 

It's an unfortunate situation. In an ideal world, she would've been at home preparing for her kid to get home from school instead of having been propagandized into defending illegals leaching off the taxpayers, or the agent could've magically known (in the fraction of a second he had to react) that the vehicle would have no traction due to icy roads and moved to the side a hair more rather than fire in self defense to climate someone who turned themselves into an aggressor. 

But in the real world those didn't happen. As is typical, people played stupid games and won stupid prizes. There's no do-overs, and yet people act like they are invulnerable to damage and injury, as if the law and physics magically don't apply because you don't like them. 

The biggest silver lining is that ICE isn't doing what the left claims they are. If they were a modern day gestapo, there would be NO surviving bystanders or media coverage of incidents like this, it would be a wholesale slaughter of anyone "brown" like they claim. But that's not reality. 

It's been so long since the laws have been enforced that they deem enforcing them as tyranny. Despite them being enforced by their own party only a decade ago with no pushback. But that's what happens when the Dems get to operate in complete secrecy while anything Trump does goes under a microscope.
